positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for ailton_pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    braga != fluminense).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    ailton_silva != braga).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    ailton_silva != nautico).

cnf(u25,negated_conjecture,
    ~played_for(ailton_silva,fluminense)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    ailton_silva != fluminense).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    loaned_to(ailton_silva,braga)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~loaned_to(X0,X1) | played_for(X0,X1)).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    played_for(ailton_silva,nautico)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    plays_for(ailton_silva,nautico)).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    played_for(ailton_silva,braga)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    nautico != fluminense).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~plays_for(X0,X1) | played_for(X0,X1)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    braga != nautico).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define is_football_club(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
